implementationSummary: Phase 2.6 P2-6 (#407) Demo exit-gate: five Playwright spec files with helpers/fixtures, playwright.config webServer on production build, demo-e2e CI job, and contract pytest asserting spec wiring. Exit gate independent of optional Analytics/Settings per ADR-026.
